overview: This frog resembles the Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii), a species endemic to Brazil. It shares characteristics with other Hylid tree frogs, specifically featuring a slender body and prominent eyes. The creature is commonly found in tropical moist shrublands and seasonally wet grasslands. iNaturalist +1 2 sites Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii) · iNaturalist May 12, 2026 — Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii) · iNaturalist. Monteverde, Puntarenas Province, Monteverde, Costa Rica - From your device
This frog resembles the Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii), a species endemic to Brazil.
It shares characteristics with other Hylid tree frogs, specifically featuring a slender body and prominent eyes.
The creature is commonly found in tropical moist shrublands and seasonally wet grasslands.
